input: 帮我审查这个项目，并自动化测试它的网站
rationale: Two primary scenario families detected (review + web_qa). Per spec §3 decision 3 (Single family v1) and G0 (multi_family → clarify, 不混编), orch MUST NOT auto-merge. Must invoke AskUserQuestion to let user pick one primary family. See spec §15.4 acceptance.

options.label: review（推荐当用户更关心代码）
options.rationale: 审查项目架构/代码质量/可精简点

options.label: web_qa（推荐当用户更关心站点运行）
options.rationale: 浏览器自动化测试 + 视觉回归 + 性能审计
